name: Conference support request
about: Use this template to create an issue that requests support for a new conference
title: Add support for <conference>

---

Add a download plugin for <conference>.

Conference website: https://example.org/

Abstracts list url: https://example.org/abstracts.json

Check the conference website for a description of the conference

Scrape as much information as possible from the abstracts list to fill as many fields as possible from the LightweightPaper dataclass. If possible, try to find a json file with the abstract information and download it.
